docs.text: To reset your password, open Settings, choose Security, then 'Change password'.
Our API enforces a rate limit of 100 requests per minute per API key.
Postgres uses B-tree indexes by default to accelerate equality and range queries.
Use exponential backoff with jitter when retrying failed HTTP requests.
A memory leak occurs when allocated objects are never released back to the heap.
JSON Web Tokens encode claims and are signed to verify their authenticity.
Streaming reads a file in fixed-size chunks so it never loads fully into RAM.
Database migrations should be reversible; always provide a down migration.
Gzip compression reduces payload size for text responses over HTTP.
Connection pooling reuses open database connections to cut latency.
The bakery's sourdough needs a 24-hour cold proof in the refrigerator.
Mount Everest is the highest mountain above sea level on Earth.
Photosynthesis converts sunlight, water, and CO2 into glucose and oxygen.
The 2008 financial crisis was triggered by subprime mortgage defaults.
Regular stretching improves flexibility and reduces injury risk.
Use prepared statements to prevent SQL injection attacks.
Caching frequently-read values in Redis lowers load on the primary database.
A load balancer distributes incoming traffic across multiple servers.
TLS encrypts data in transit between the client and the server.
Pagination returns results in pages to avoid huge single responses.
